lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Python Mk II ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Python Mk II
sources.what: Ship-specific stats, hardpoint & internal layout, and shipyard pricing.

sources.label: Fandom — Python Mk II
sources.what: Faulcon DeLacy lore, combat-focused redesign, and the ship's spec reference.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Opinionated review of the combat Python Mk II, covering firepower, hardpoint layout and its role against the original Python.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Bounty-hunter build for the Python Mk II centred on the Pacifier frag cannon and its large-hardpoint loadout.

sources.label: YouTube — Obsidian Ant
sources.what: Pre-release preview of the Python Mk II, walking through its combat orientation, hardpoints and handling.
